---
title: "Repository List"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

This document lists repositories in the [IPBES-Data GitHub organization](https://github.com/IPBES-Data).

## Repository Explorer {#repository-explorer}

```{r}
source("scripts/site_data_utils.R")

tg_directory_page <- "https://ipbes-data.github.io/IPBES_TG_Directory/"

inputs <- load_site_inputs()
assessments <- inputs$assessments
tg_labels_fallback <- inputs$tg_labels_fallback

repo_result <- get_org_repos_for_repos(org = "IPBES-Data")
repos <- repo_result$data
repo_source <- repo_result$source
doi_map <- get_repo_doi_map(repos)
pcc_repo_map <- get_repo_pcc_map(repos)

tg_result <- load_tg_labels(tg_labels_fallback, directory_url = tg_directory_page)
tg_pages <- tg_result$data

if (nrow(repos) > 0 && nrow(tg_pages) > 0) {
  tg_repo_names <- repos$repo_name[grepl("^IPBES_TG_", repos$repo_name)]
  tg_pages <- tg_pages[tg_pages$repo_name %in% tg_repo_names, , drop = FALSE]
  tg_pages <- order_tg_labels(tg_pages)
}

assessment_repo_summary <- summarize_assessment_repositories(repos, assessments, repo_name_col = "repo_name")
assessment_repos <- assessment_repo_summary$data

assessment_lookup <- unique(data.frame(
  assessment_abbreviation = toupper(assessments$abbreviation),
  Assessment = assessments$short_name,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
))

format_archived <- function(x) {
  ifelse(is.na(x), "Unknown", ifelse(x, "Yes", "No"))
}

lookup_repo_doi <- function(repo_name, doi_df) {
  if (is.null(doi_df) || nrow(doi_df) == 0 || is.na(repo_name) || !nzchar(repo_name)) {
    return("")
  }
  hit <- which(doi_df$repo_name == repo_name)
  if (length(hit) == 0) {
    return("")
  }
  doi_url <- doi_df$doi_url[hit[1]]
  ifelse(is.na(doi_url), "", doi_url)
}

build_properties_html <- function(archived_value, visibility_value) {
  archived_icon <- if (!is.na(archived_value) && archived_value %in% "Yes") {
    "<img class='prop-status-icon' src='assets/icons/archived_icon.svg' alt='Archived'/>"
  } else "&nbsp;"
  visibility_icon <- if (!is.na(visibility_value) && tolower(visibility_value) == "private") {
    "<img class='prop-status-icon' src='assets/icons/private_icon.svg' alt='Private'/>"
  } else if (!is.na(visibility_value) && nzchar(visibility_value)) {
    "<img class='prop-status-icon' src='assets/icons/public_icon.svg' alt='Public'/>"
  } else "&nbsp;"

  paste0(
    "<span class='prop-slot' title='Archived'>", archived_icon, "</span>",
    "<span class='prop-slot' title='Visibility'>", visibility_icon, "</span>"
  )
}

build_properties_key <- function(archived_value, visibility_value) {
  parts <- character(0)
  if (!is.na(archived_value) && archived_value %in% "Yes") {
    parts <- c(parts, "Archived")
  }
  if (!is.na(visibility_value) && tolower(visibility_value) == "private") {
    parts <- c(parts, "Private")
  } else if (!is.na(visibility_value) && nzchar(visibility_value)) {
    parts <- c(parts, "Public")
  }
  paste(parts, collapse = " ")
}

build_license_html <- function(spdx_id, license_url) {
  if (is.na(spdx_id) || !nzchar(spdx_id) || toupper(spdx_id) %in% c("NOASSERTION", "NONE")) {
    return("")
  }
  safe_id <- gsub("-", "--", spdx_id, fixed = TRUE)
  safe_id <- gsub("_", "__", safe_id, fixed = TRUE)
  safe_id <- gsub(" ", "%20", safe_id, fixed = TRUE)
  badge_url <- paste0("https://img.shields.io/badge/", safe_id, "-2f5f2f?style=flat-square")
  target_url <- ifelse(is.na(license_url) || !nzchar(license_url), paste0("https://spdx.org/licenses/", spdx_id, ".html"), license_url)
  paste0(
    "<a href='", target_url, "' target='_blank' rel='noopener' title='", spdx_id, "'>",
    "<img class='license-badge' src='", badge_url, "' alt='", spdx_id, " license'/>",
    "</a>"
  )
}

build_published_links <- function(repo_url, repo_name, has_pages, homepage, pcc_map_df, doi_value = "", pcc_url = "") {
  repo_link <- ""
  github_link <- ""
  pcc_link <- ""
  doi_link <- ""

  if (!is.na(repo_url) && nzchar(repo_url)) {
    repo_link <- paste0(
      "<a class='pub-link page-repo' href='", repo_url, "' target='_blank' rel='noopener' title='Open GitHub repository'>",
      "<img class='prop-status-icon' src='assets/icons/repository_gh_icon.svg' alt='GitHub repository'/>",
      "</a>"
    )
  }

  if (!is.na(has_pages) && isTRUE(has_pages)) {
    gh_url <- infer_github_pages_url(repo_name, homepage = homepage, org = "IPBES-Data")
    github_link <- paste0(
      "<a class='pub-link page-ghp' href='", gh_url, "' target='_blank' rel='noopener' title='Published on GitHub Pages'>",
      "<img class='prop-status-icon' src='assets/icons/published_ghp_icon.svg' alt='Published on GitHub Pages'/>",
      "</a>"
    )
  }

  if (!is.na(pcc_url) && nzchar(pcc_url)) {
    pcc_link <- paste0(
      "<a class='pub-link page-pcc' href='", pcc_url, "' target='_blank' rel='noopener' title='Published on Posit Connect Cloud'>",
      "<img class='prop-status-icon' src='assets/icons/published_pcc_icon.svg' alt='Published on Posit Connect Cloud'/>",
      "</a>"
    )
  } else if (!is.null(pcc_map_df) && nrow(pcc_map_df) > 0) {
    hit <- which(pcc_map_df$repo_name == repo_name)
    if (length(hit) > 0) {
      pcc_url_map <- pcc_map_df$pcc_url[hit[1]]
      if (!is.na(pcc_url_map) && nzchar(pcc_url_map)) {
        pcc_link <- paste0(
          "<a class='pub-link page-pcc' href='", pcc_url_map, "' target='_blank' rel='noopener' title='Published on Posit Connect Cloud'>",
          "<img class='prop-status-icon' src='assets/icons/published_pcc_icon.svg' alt='Published on Posit Connect Cloud'/>",
          "</a>"
        )
      }
    }
  }

  if (!is.na(doi_value) && nzchar(doi_value)) {
    doi_link <- paste0(
      "<a class='pub-link page-doi' href='", doi_value, "' target='_blank' rel='noopener' title='Published DOI'>",
      "<img class='doi-logo-icon' src='assets/icons/doi_icon.svg' alt='Published DOI'/>",
      "</a>"
    )
  }

  slot <- function(link_html) {
    if (!is.na(link_html) && nzchar(link_html)) {
      return(link_html)
    }
    "<span class='pub-empty' aria-hidden='true'>&nbsp;</span>"
  }

  paste0(
    "<div class='pub-grid'>",
    "<span class='pub-slot' title='DOI'>", slot(doi_link), "</span>",
    "<span class='pub-slot' title='GitHub repository'>", slot(repo_link), "</span>",
    "<span class='pub-slot' title='Published on GitHub Pages'>", slot(github_link), "</span>",
    "<span class='pub-slot' title='Published on Posit Connect Cloud'>", slot(pcc_link), "</span>",
    "</div>"
  )
}

if (nrow(repos) == 0) {
  cat("Repository data is currently unavailable from the GitHub API/cache.")
} else {
  assessment_rows <- data.frame()
  tg_rows <- data.frame()
  other_rows <- data.frame()

  if (nrow(assessment_repos) > 0) {
    assessment_repos$assessment_abbreviation <- toupper(assessment_repos$assessment_abbreviation)
    assessment_repos <- merge(
      assessment_repos,
      assessment_lookup,
      by = "assessment_abbreviation",
      all.x = TRUE,
      sort = FALSE
    )
    assessment_repos$Assessment <- ifelse(
      is.na(assessment_repos$Assessment) | !nzchar(assessment_repos$Assessment),
      assessment_repos$assessment_abbreviation,
      assessment_repos$Assessment
    )

    assessment_rows <- data.frame(
      Category = "Assessment related",
      Item = assessment_repos$Assessment,
      Description = ifelse(is.na(assessment_repos$description), "", assessment_repos$description),
      License = vapply(
        seq_len(nrow(assessment_repos)),
        function(i) build_license_html(assessment_repos$license_spdx[i], assessment_repos$license_url[i]),
        character(1)
      ),
      Published = vapply(
        seq_len(nrow(assessment_repos)),
        function(i) build_published_links(
          repo_url = assessment_repos$url[i],
          repo_name = assessment_repos$repo_name[i],
          has_pages = assessment_repos$has_pages[i],
          homepage = assessment_repos$homepage[i],
          pcc_map_df = pcc_repo_map,
          doi_value = lookup_repo_doi(assessment_repos$repo_name[i], doi_df = doi_map)
        ),
        character(1)
      ),
      Archived = format_archived(assessment_repos$archived),
      Visibility = ifelse(is.na(assessment_repos$visibility), "", assessment_repos$visibility),
      DOI = vapply(assessment_repos$repo_name, lookup_repo_doi, character(1), doi_df = doi_map),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }

  if (nrow(tg_pages) > 0) {
    tg_meta <- repos[repos$repo_name %in% tg_pages$repo_name, c("repo_name", "url", "description", "visibility", "archived", "license_spdx", "license_url", "has_pages", "homepage"), drop = FALSE]
    tg_table <- merge(tg_pages, tg_meta, by = "repo_name", all.x = TRUE, sort = FALSE)

    tg_rows <- data.frame(
      Category = "TGs",
      Item = tg_table$title,
      Description = ifelse(is.na(tg_table$description), "", tg_table$description),
      License = vapply(
        seq_len(nrow(tg_table)),
        function(i) build_license_html(tg_table$license_spdx[i], tg_table$license_url[i]),
        character(1)
      ),
      Published = vapply(
        seq_len(nrow(tg_table)),
        function(i) build_published_links(
          repo_url = tg_table$url[i],
          repo_name = tg_table$repo_name[i],
          has_pages = tg_table$has_pages[i],
          homepage = tg_table$homepage[i],
          pcc_map_df = pcc_repo_map,
          doi_value = lookup_repo_doi(tg_table$repo_name[i], doi_df = doi_map)
        ),
        character(1)
      ),
      Archived = format_archived(tg_table$archived),
      Visibility = ifelse(is.na(tg_table$visibility), "", tg_table$visibility),
      DOI = vapply(tg_table$repo_name, lookup_repo_doi, character(1), doi_df = doi_map),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }

  assessment_repo_names <- if (nrow(assessment_repos) > 0) assessment_repos$repo_name else character(0)
  other_repos <- repos[
    !(repos$repo_name %in% assessment_repo_names) & !grepl("^IPBES_TG_", repos$repo_name),
    ,
    drop = FALSE
  ]

  if (nrow(other_repos) > 0) {
    other_repos <- other_repos[order(tolower(other_repos$repo_name)), , drop = FALSE]
    other_rows <- data.frame(
      Category = "Other",
      Item = other_repos$repo_name,
      Description = ifelse(is.na(other_repos$description), "", other_repos$description),
      License = vapply(
        seq_len(nrow(other_repos)),
        function(i) build_license_html(other_repos$license_spdx[i], other_repos$license_url[i]),
        character(1)
      ),
      Published = vapply(
        seq_len(nrow(other_repos)),
        function(i) build_published_links(
          repo_url = other_repos$url[i],
          repo_name = other_repos$repo_name[i],
          has_pages = other_repos$has_pages[i],
          homepage = other_repos$homepage[i],
          pcc_map_df = pcc_repo_map,
          doi_value = lookup_repo_doi(other_repos$repo_name[i], doi_df = doi_map)
        ),
        character(1)
      ),
      Archived = format_archived(other_repos$archived),
      Visibility = ifelse(is.na(other_repos$visibility), "", other_repos$visibility),
      DOI = vapply(other_repos$repo_name, lookup_repo_doi, character(1), doi_df = doi_map),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }

  unified <- rbind(assessment_rows, tg_rows, other_rows)
  if (nrow(unified) == 0) {
    cat("No repositories available to display.")
  } else {
    unified$Properties <- vapply(
      seq_len(nrow(unified)),
      function(i) build_properties_html(unified$Archived[i], unified$Visibility[i]),
      character(1)
    )
    unified$PropertiesKey <- vapply(
      seq_len(nrow(unified)),
      function(i) build_properties_key(unified$Archived[i], unified$Visibility[i]),
      character(1)
    )
    unified$PublishedKey <- vapply(
      unified$Published,
      function(x) {
        parts <- character(0)
        if (!is.na(x) && grepl("page-repo", x, fixed = TRUE)) parts <- c(parts, "GH")
        if (!is.na(x) && grepl("page-ghp", x, fixed = TRUE)) parts <- c(parts, "GHP")
        if (!is.na(x) && grepl("page-pcc", x, fixed = TRUE)) parts <- c(parts, "PCC")
        if (!is.na(x) && grepl("page-doi", x, fixed = TRUE)) parts <- c(parts, "DOI")
        paste(parts, collapse = " ")
      },
      character(1)
    )
    unified$StatusKey <- vapply(
      seq_len(nrow(unified)),
      function(i) {
        parts <- character(0)
        if (grepl("DOI", unified$PublishedKey[i], fixed = TRUE)) parts <- c(parts, "DOI")
        if (grepl("GHP", unified$PublishedKey[i], fixed = TRUE)) parts <- c(parts, "GHP")
        if (grepl("PCC", unified$PublishedKey[i], fixed = TRUE)) parts <- c(parts, "PCC")
        if (grepl("Archived", unified$PropertiesKey[i], fixed = TRUE)) parts <- c(parts, "Archived")
        if (grepl("Private", unified$PropertiesKey[i], fixed = TRUE)) parts <- c(parts, "Private")
        if (length(parts) == 0) "NONE" else paste(parts, collapse = " ")
      },
      character(1)
    )
    unified <- unified[, c("Category", "Item", "Description", "License", "Published", "Properties", "PropertiesKey", "PublishedKey", "StatusKey")]

    controls <- htmltools::HTML("\
<div class='repo-scope-filter'>\
  <strong>Scope 1 (Category)</strong>\
  <label><input type='radio' name='repo_scope_cat' value='all' checked> All</label>\
  <label><input type='radio' name='repo_scope_cat' value='assessment'> Assessment related</label>\
  <label><input type='radio' name='repo_scope_cat' value='tgs'> TGs</label>\
  <label><input type='radio' name='repo_scope_cat' value='other'> Other</label>\
</div>\
<div class='repo-scope-filter'>\
  <strong>Scope 2 (Status)</strong>\
  <label><input type='radio' name='repo_scope_pub' value='all' checked> All</label>\
  <label><input type='radio' name='repo_scope_pub' value='doi'> Have DOIs</label>\
  <label><input type='radio' name='repo_scope_pub' value='github'> Published on GHP</label>\
  <label><input type='radio' name='repo_scope_pub' value='pcc'> Published on PCC</label>\
  <label><input type='radio' name='repo_scope_pub' value='archived'> Archived</label>\
  <label><input type='radio' name='repo_scope_pub' value='public'> Public</label>\
  <label><input type='radio' name='repo_scope_pub' value='private'> Private</label>\
</div>\
")

    tbl <- DT::datatable(
      unified,
      escape = FALSE,
      rownames = FALSE,
      filter = "top",
      elementId = "repo-unified-table",
      options = list(
        pageLength = 10,
        autoWidth = FALSE,
        order = list(list(0, "asc"), list(1, "asc")),
        columnDefs = list(
          list(width = "12%", targets = 0),
          list(width = "24%", targets = 1),
          list(width = "31%", targets = 2),
          list(width = "9%", targets = 3),
          list(width = "12%", targets = 4),
          list(width = "12%", targets = 5, orderData = 6),
          list(targets = 6, visible = FALSE, searchable = TRUE),
          list(targets = 7, visible = FALSE, searchable = TRUE),
          list(targets = 8, visible = FALSE, searchable = TRUE)
        )
      ),
      callback = DT::JS("\
var categoryCol = 0;\
var pageCol = 4;\
var propertiesCol = 5;\
var propertiesKeyCol = 6;\
var publishedKeyCol = 7;\
var statusKeyCol = 8;\
\
var $container = $(table.table().container());\
var $ths = $container.find('thead th');\
$ths.eq(pageCol).css('white-space', 'nowrap');\
$ths.eq(propertiesCol).attr('title', 'Properties:\\n1. Archived\\n2. Visibility').css('white-space', 'nowrap');\
var $filterCells = $container.find('thead tr:eq(1) th');\
if ($filterCells.length > 3) {\
  $filterCells.eq(3).html('');\
}\
if ($filterCells.length > pageCol) {\
  $filterCells.eq(pageCol).html('');\
}\
if ($filterCells.length > propertiesCol) {\
  $filterCells.eq(propertiesCol).html('');\
}\
\
function applyScopes(catScope, pubScope) {\
  table.column(categoryCol).search('', true, false);\
  table.column(pageCol).search('', false, false);\
  table.column(propertiesKeyCol).search('', false, false);\
  table.column(publishedKeyCol).search('', false, false);\
  table.column(statusKeyCol).search('', false, false);\
\
  if (catScope === 'assessment') {\
    table.column(categoryCol).search('^Assessment related$', true, false);\
  } else if (catScope === 'tgs') {\
    table.column(categoryCol).search('^TGs$', true, false);\
  } else if (catScope === 'other') {\
    table.column(categoryCol).search('^Other$', true, false);\
  }\
\
  if (pubScope === 'doi') {\
    table.column(publishedKeyCol).search('DOI', false, false);\
  } else if (pubScope === 'github') {\
    table.column(publishedKeyCol).search('GHP', false, false);\
  } else if (pubScope === 'pcc') {\
    table.column(publishedKeyCol).search('PCC', false, false);\
  } else if (pubScope === 'archived') {\
    table.column(propertiesKeyCol).search('Archived', false, false);\
  } else if (pubScope === 'public') {\
    table.column(propertiesKeyCol).search('Public', false, false);\
  } else if (pubScope === 'private') {\
    table.column(propertiesKeyCol).search('Private', false, false);\
  }\
\
  table.draw();\
}\
\
function getScopesFromUrl() {\
  var allowedCat = ['all', 'assessment', 'tgs', 'other'];\
  var allowedPub = ['all', 'doi', 'github', 'pcc', 'archived', 'public', 'private'];\
  var params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\
  var cat = (params.get('scope_cat') || '').toLowerCase();\
  var pub = (params.get('scope_pub') || '').toLowerCase();\
  if (allowedCat.indexOf(cat) < 0) cat = 'all';\
  if (allowedPub.indexOf(pub) < 0) pub = 'all';\
\
  var legacy = (params.get('scope') || '').toLowerCase();\
  if (legacy && legacy !== 'all') {\
    if (allowedCat.indexOf(legacy) >= 0) cat = legacy;\
    if (allowedPub.indexOf(legacy) >= 0) pub = legacy;\
  }\
\
  return {cat: cat, pub: pub};\
}\
\
$(document).off('change.repoScopeCat').on('change.repoScopeCat', 'input[name=\"repo_scope_cat\"]', function() {\
  var cat = $('input[name=\"repo_scope_cat\"]:checked').val() || 'all';\
  var pub = $('input[name=\"repo_scope_pub\"]:checked').val() || 'all';\
  applyScopes(cat, pub);\
});\
\
$(document).off('change.repoScopePub').on('change.repoScopePub', 'input[name=\"repo_scope_pub\"]', function() {\
  var cat = $('input[name=\"repo_scope_cat\"]:checked').val() || 'all';\
  var pub = $('input[name=\"repo_scope_pub\"]:checked').val() || 'all';\
  applyScopes(cat, pub);\
});\
\
var initialScopes = getScopesFromUrl();\
$('input[name=\"repo_scope_cat\"][value=\"' + initialScopes.cat + '\"]').prop('checked', true);\
$('input[name=\"repo_scope_pub\"][value=\"' + initialScopes.pub + '\"]').prop('checked', true);\
applyScopes(initialScopes.cat, initialScopes.pub);\
")
    )

    htmltools::browsable(htmltools::tagList(
      controls,
      tbl,
      htmltools::tags$div(style = "margin-top:0.5rem;color:#2f3f2a;", paste0("Repository source: ", repo_source, "."))
    ))
  }
}
```
